## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change with no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — test coverage only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / build / dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [commit convention](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-convention)
- [ ] I have run `make lint` and `make type-check` locally with no new errors
- [ ] I have run `make test` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation in `docs/` if this change affects documented behavior
- [ ] I have not decreased test coverage for the code I touched
